name: Pork-Ribs in Delicious Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil, put in the seasoned pork ribs (seasoned for about 30 minutes) and deep fry for about 3 minutes. Drain well.
2. With the remaining oil, fry garlic and stir through the seasoning sauce. Pour into a dish with the well-fried pork ribs. Stir thoroughly.
3. Dish out to garnish with lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and parsley before serving.
